title: TeamT5
description: The TeamT5 connector imports threat intelligence from the Team T5 Platform into OpenCTI. Team T5 is an Asia-Pacific cyber threat intelligence provider specializing in APT tracking and adversary profiling. The connector ingests Reports and Indicator Bundles, creating structured STIX objects including intrusion sets, campaigns, malware, and IOCs.
short_description: Imports threat reports and indicator bundles from the TeamT5 APT threat intelligence platform into OpenCTI.
